content:
https://youtu.be/48_wR1HMdmA?si=H6Z4rI3BGM25WFOm

i stopped creating projects at all, i lost my will;

i created three pieces during this phase (i will show these in the next prompt)

to
VP H1lls B4CKVV4RDs
a multi angle short film cubist study never released;

2
VVRVNG_V
handwritten poem animation overlayed on photograph of madison and i in DC (first Swamp Ape Review AWP 2016) with audio from florida years

3
and as a collaborative group project during covid lockdown, Chris and Daniele (after the random success of there swede cardboard low fi jurassic park hitting over 16M views on Cardboard Movie Co YT channel) they settled on Alien (a foundational movie for my aesthetic and lifetime[dad rec'd it, blockbuster trips])) and we all (Madison as Alien and the other female character Lambert i think, Daniel as the black guy and is a white tall only child and former preacher, Enrique who built the alien and was the chest burst victim, Hunter the right right right guy) worked on that together for months, my main role was sound capture and creation and polish, i also filmed a lot as the only non actor and think my angles are really great, but also received so much positive comments for my work, and with nearly 1M views is my most watched project.....and is a goddamn COVER ....another cycle!!!
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 8 (chunk 8/13)
